scripts.postbuild: node -e "const f='dist/server/wrangler.json',fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync(f)){const c=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(f,'utf8'));['assets','kv_namespaces','main','rules','no_bundle'].forEach(k=>delete c[k]);if(c.triggers&&Object.keys(c.triggers).length===0)delete c.triggers;fs.writeFileSync(f,JSON.stringify(c,null,2));console.log('Patched wrangler.json for Cloudflare Pages compatibility')}"
